all_manifestations.label: Sub-THz coverage achieved
all_manifestations.description: Single platform covers 8 kHz to 300 GHz with integrated sub-THz frontend.

all_manifestations.label: Millimeter-wave extension
all_manifestations.description: Coverage extends to 110 GHz. Sub-THz requires external module.

all_manifestations.label: Current range maintained
all_manifestations.description: 8 kHz to 40 GHz with incremental sensitivity gains only.

all_manifestations.label: Autonomous spectrum management
all_manifestations.description: AI handles real-time spectrum allocation, violation detection, and enforcement recommendations without human intervention.

all_manifestations.label: AI-assisted monitoring
all_manifestations.description: AI flags anomalies and suggests actions, but humans remain in the loop for decisions.

all_manifestations.label: Limited ML adoption
all_manifestations.description: Regulatory conservatism and data quality issues prevent meaningful AI deployment.

all_manifestations.label: Room-temperature quantum sensors deployed
all_manifestations.description: Quantum RF sensors operate at room temperature and are integrated into monitoring stations.

all_manifestations.label: Lab-scale quantum sensing
all_manifestations.description: Quantum sensors work in controlled environments but are not field-deployable.

all_manifestations.label: Quantum sensing remains theoretical
all_manifestations.description: No practical quantum RF sensing achieved by 2035.
